name: multi_drums_bass_melody
code:
use_bpm 120

live_loop :drums do
  sample :bd_haus
  sleep 0.5
  sample :sn_dub
  sleep 0.5
end

live_loop :bass, sync: :drums do
  use_synth :tb303
  play :c2, release: 0.3, cutoff: 80
  sleep 0.5
  play :c2, release: 0.3, cutoff: 60
  sleep 0.25
  play :eb2, release: 0.3, cutoff: 70
  sleep 0.25
end

live_loop :melody, sync: :drums do
  use_synth :prophet
  play scale(:c4, :minor_pentatonic).choose, release: 0.2, amp: 0.6
  sleep 0.25
end

name: multi_four_part
code:
use_bpm 130

live_loop :metro do
  sleep 1
end

live_loop :kick, sync: :metro do
  sample :bd_808, amp: 1.5
  sleep 1
end

live_loop :hats, sync: :metro do
  sample :hat_bdu, amp: 0.4
  sleep 0.25
end

live_loop :bass, sync: :metro do
  use_synth :dsaw
  notes = ring(:c2, :c2, :eb2, :f2)
  play notes.tick, release: 0.3, cutoff: 70
  sleep 0.5
end

live_loop :lead, sync: :metro do
  use_synth :saw
  play scale(:c4, :minor).choose, release: 0.15, amp: 0.4, cutoff: 90
  sleep 0.25
end

name: multi_sync_cue_chain
code:
use_bpm 110

live_loop :pulse do
  sample :bd_haus
  cue :beat
  sleep 0.5
end

live_loop :snare do
  sync :beat
  sleep 0.5
  sample :sn_dub
  sleep 0.5
end

live_loop :pad, sync: :pulse do
  use_synth :hollow
  play chord(:c4, :minor7), release: 4, amp: 0.3
  sleep 4
end

name: multi_layered_groove
code:
use_bpm 125

live_loop :met do
  sleep 1
end

live_loop :kick, sync: :met do
  sample :bd_zum, amp: 1.5
  sleep 0.5
  sleep 0.25
  sample :bd_zum, amp: 0.8
  sleep 0.25
end

live_loop :perc, sync: :met do
  sample :perc_snap, amp: 0.5 if one_in(3)
  sleep 0.25
end

live_loop :chords, sync: :met do
  use_synth :supersaw
  play chord(:eb3, :minor7), release: 1.5, amp: 0.3, cutoff: 80
  sleep 2
  play chord(:ab3, :major7), release: 1.5, amp: 0.3, cutoff: 80
  sleep 2
end

name: multi_progressive_build
code:
use_bpm 128

live_loop :base do
  sample :bd_haus
  sleep 0.5
end

live_loop :layer2, sync: :base do
  sleep 8
  sample :hat_bdu, amp: 0.3
  sleep 0.25
end

live_loop :layer3, sync: :base do
  sleep 16
  use_synth :tb303
  play :e2, release: 0.2, cutoff: rrand(60, 100)
  sleep 0.25
end

name: multi_call_response
code:
use_bpm 100

live_loop :call do
  use_synth :pluck
  play_pattern_timed [:c4, :e4, :g4], [0.25, 0.25]
  sleep 1.5
end

live_loop :response, sync: :call do
  sleep 1
  use_synth :piano
  play_pattern_timed [:g4, :e4, :c4], [0.25, 0.25]
  sleep 1.5
end

name: multi_world_music
code:
use_bpm 90

live_loop :tabla do
  sample :bd_boom, amp: 0.8
  sleep 0.5
  sample :perc_bell, amp: 0.3, rate: 1.5
  sleep 0.25
  sample :perc_bell, amp: 0.2, rate: 2
  sleep 0.25
end

live_loop :sitar, sync: :tabla do
  use_synth :pluck
  play scale(:d4, :hungarian_minor).choose, release: 0.3, amp: 0.5
  sleep 0.5
end

name: multi_jazz_trio
code:
use_bpm 105

live_loop :ride do
  sample :drum_cymbal_closed, amp: 0.3
  sleep 0.25
  sample :drum_cymbal_closed, amp: 0.2
  sleep 0.5
  sample :drum_cymbal_closed, amp: 0.25
  sleep 0.25
end

live_loop :walking_bass, sync: :ride do
  use_synth :fm
  notes = ring(:c2, :e2, :f2, :g2, :a2, :g2, :f2, :e2)
  play notes.tick, release: 0.4, amp: 0.6
  sleep 0.5
end

live_loop :comping, sync: :ride do
  use_synth :piano
  if one_in(3)
    play chord(:c4, :dom7), release: 0.3, amp: 0.3
  end
  sleep 1
end

name: multi_ambient_layers
code:
use_bpm 70

live_loop :drone do
  use_synth :hollow
  play :c3, release: 8, amp: 0.3
  sleep 8
end

live_loop :shimmer, sync: :drone do
  use_synth :pretty_bell
  play scale(:c5, :major).choose, release: 2, amp: 0.15
  sleep rrand(0.5, 2)
end

live_loop :texture, sync: :drone do
  sample :ambi_choir, rate: 0.5, amp: 0.2
  sleep 4
end

name: multi_breakbeat
code:
use_bpm 140

live_loop :breaks do
  sample :loop_amen, beat_stretch: 2, amp: 0.8
  sleep 2
end

live_loop :bass, sync: :breaks do
  use_synth :dsaw
  play :e1, release: 0.2, cutoff: 80, amp: 0.7
  sleep 0.5
  play :e1, release: 0.1, cutoff: 60, amp: 0.5
  sleep 0.25
  play :g1, release: 0.2, cutoff: 70, amp: 0.6
  sleep 0.25
end

name: ambient_deep_space
code:
use_bpm 60

with_fx :reverb, room: 1, mix: 0.8 do
  live_loop :space do
    use_synth :hollow
    play :c3, attack: 2, sustain: 4, release: 4, amp: 0.3
    sleep 8
    play :g2, attack: 2, sustain: 4, release: 4, amp: 0.25
    sleep 8
  end
end

name: ambient_forest
code:
use_bpm 50

with_fx :reverb, room: 0.9, mix: 0.7 do
  with_fx :echo, phase: 0.75, decay: 4, mix: 0.5 do
    live_loop :birds do
      use_synth :pretty_bell
      play rrand_i(72, 96), release: 0.5, amp: 0.2
      sleep rrand(0.5, 3)
    end
  end
end

live_loop :wind do
  sample :ambi_dark_woosh, rate: 0.3, amp: 0.15
  sleep 8
end

name: ambient_underwater
code:
use_bpm 55

with_fx :lpf, cutoff: 80 do
  with_fx :reverb, room: 1, mix: 0.9 do
    live_loop :deep do
      use_synth :dark_ambience
      play :e2, release: 8, amp: 0.4
      sleep 8
    end

    live_loop :bubbles do
      use_synth :sine
      play rrand_i(60, 84), release: 0.3, amp: 0.1
      sleep rrand(0.25, 1.5)
    end
  end
end

name: ambient_crystal
code:
with_fx :reverb, room: 0.95, mix: 0.8 do
  with_fx :echo, phase: 0.5, decay: 6, mix: 0.4 do
    live_loop :crystals do
      use_synth :pretty_bell
      notes = scale(:e4, :major)
      play notes.choose, release: 3, amp: 0.2
      sleep rrand(1, 4)
    end
  end
end

name: ambient_choir_pad
code:
use_bpm 60

live_loop :pad do
  use_synth :hollow
  with_fx :reverb, room: 0.9 do
    play chord(:c4, :sus4), attack: 3, sustain: 4, release: 3, amp: 0.3
    sleep 8
    play chord(:f3, :sus2), attack: 3, sustain: 4, release: 3, amp: 0.3
    sleep 8
  end
end

name: ambient_moonlight
code:
use_bpm 65

with_fx :reverb, room: 0.9, mix: 0.7 do
  live_loop :moon do
    use_synth :blade
    notes = ring(:c4, :e4, :g4, :b4, :c5)
    play notes.tick, attack: 0.5, release: 3, amp: 0.25
    sleep 2
  end
end

name: ambient_rain
code:
live_loop :rain do
  with_fx :reverb, room: 0.8 do
    use_synth :noise
    play :c4, release: 0.05, amp: rrand(0.01, 0.05)
    sleep rrand(0.02, 0.15)
  end
end

live_loop :thunder do
  sleep rrand(8, 20)
  sample :ambi_dark_woosh, rate: 0.5, amp: 0.5
  sleep 1
end

name: ambient_meditation
code:
use_bpm 50

with_fx :reverb, room: 1, mix: 0.85 do
  live_loop :bowl do
    use_synth :sine
    play :c3, attack: 2, sustain: 6, release: 4, amp: 0.3
    sleep 12
    play :g3, attack: 2, sustain: 6, release: 4, amp: 0.25
    sleep 12
  end

  live_loop :chime do
    use_synth :pretty_bell
    play scale(:c5, :major).choose, release: 4, amp: 0.1
    sleep rrand(3, 8)
  end
end

name: ambient_northern_lights
code:
use_bpm 55

with_fx :reverb, room: 0.95 do
  live_loop :aurora do
    use_synth :hollow
    play chord(:a3, :minor7), attack: 1, sustain: 4, release: 2, amp: 0.3
    sleep 8
    play chord(:d3, :sus4), attack: 1, sustain: 4, release: 2, amp: 0.3
    sleep 8
  end
end

name: ambient_galaxy
code:
use_bpm 45

with_fx :reverb, room: 1, mix: 0.9 do
  live_loop :stars do
    use_synth :sine
    play rrand_i(48, 84), attack: 1, release: rrand(2, 6), amp: 0.1
    sleep rrand(0.5, 2)
  end

  live_loop :nebula do
    use_synth :dark_ambience
    play :d2, release: 12, amp: 0.3
    sleep 12
  end
end

name: drums_four_on_floor
code:
use_bpm 128

live_loop :kick do
  sample :bd_haus, amp: 1.5
  sleep 1
end

live_loop :hats, sync: :kick do
  sample :hat_bdu, amp: 0.4
  sleep 0.5
end

live_loop :snare, sync: :kick do
  sleep 1
  sample :sn_dub, amp: 0.8
  sleep 1
end

name: drums_breakbeat_pattern
code:
use_bpm 135

live_loop :breaks do
  pattern = knit(:bd_808, 3, :sn_generic, 1, :bd_808, 1, :sn_generic, 1, :bd_808, 1, :sn_generic, 1)
  sample pattern.tick, amp: 0.8
  sleep 0.25
end

name: drums_euclidean
code:
use_bpm 120

live_loop :euclid_kick do
  sample :bd_haus, amp: 1 if spread(5, 8).tick
  sleep 0.25
end

live_loop :euclid_hat, sync: :euclid_kick do
  sample :hat_bdu, amp: 0.3 if spread(7, 16).tick
  sleep 0.125
end

name: drums_trap_hats
code:
use_bpm 140

live_loop :kick do
  sample :bd_808, amp: 2
  sleep 1
  sleep 0.5
  sample :bd_808, amp: 1.5
  sleep 0.5
end

live_loop :hats, sync: :kick do
  sample :hat_gem, amp: rrand(0.1, 0.4), rate: rrand(0.9, 1.1)
  sleep ring(0.25, 0.25, 0.125, 0.125, 0.25).tick
end

live_loop :snare, sync: :kick do
  sleep 1
  sample :sn_generic, amp: 0.8
  sleep 1
end

name: drums_latin
code:
use_bpm 110

live_loop :clave do
  rhythm = ring(1,0,0,1,0,0,1,0,0,0,1,0,1,0,0,0)
  sample :perc_snap, amp: 0.6 if rhythm.tick == 1
  sleep 0.25
end

live_loop :congas, sync: :clave do
  sample :bd_boom, amp: 0.5, rate: 1.5
  sleep 0.5
  sample :bd_boom, amp: 0.3, rate: 2
  sleep 0.25
  sample :bd_boom, amp: 0.4, rate: 1.8
  sleep 0.25
end

name: drums_industrial
code:
use_bpm 125

live_loop :metal do
  with_fx :distortion, distort: 0.8 do
    sample :bd_808, amp: 2
    sleep 0.5
    sample :elec_blip, amp: 0.3, rate: 0.5
    sleep 0.25
    sample :sn_generic, amp: 1.2
    sleep 0.25
  end
end

name: drums_polyrhythm
code:
use_bpm 100

live_loop :three do
  sample :bd_haus, amp: 1
  sleep 1.0/3
end

live_loop :four, sync: :three do
  sample :hat_bdu, amp: 0.4
  sleep 0.25
end

name: drums_shuffle
code:
use_bpm 110

live_loop :shuffle do
  sample :bd_haus, amp: 1.2
  sleep 0.25
  sample :hat_bdu, amp: 0.3
  sleep 0.375
  sample :hat_bdu, amp: 0.2
  sleep 0.125
  sample :sn_dub, amp: 0.7
  sleep 0.25
end

name: drums_dnb
code:
use_bpm 170

live_loop :dnb do
  sample :bd_haus, amp: 1.5
  sleep 0.75
  sample :sn_generic, amp: 1
  sleep 0.5
  sample :bd_haus, amp: 0.8
  sleep 0.25
  sleep 0.5
end

live_loop :ride, sync: :dnb do
  sample :drum_cymbal_closed, amp: 0.2
  sleep 0.25
end

name: drums_minimal
code:
use_bpm 122

live_loop :minimal do
  sample :bd_haus, amp: 1.2 if spread(3, 8).tick(:k)
  sample :perc_snap, amp: 0.3 if spread(5, 8).tick(:s)
  sleep 0.25
end

name: bass_acid_303
code:
use_bpm 130
use_synth :tb303

live_loop :acid do
  notes = ring(:c2, :c2, :eb2, :c2, :f2, :c2, :g2, :c2)
  play notes.tick, release: 0.2, cutoff: rrand(60, 120), res: 0.8, wave: 0
  sleep 0.25
end

name: bass_sub_wobble
code:
use_bpm 140

live_loop :sub do
  use_synth :dsaw
  with_fx :wobble, phase: 0.5 do
    play :e1, release: 0.8, cutoff: 70, amp: 0.8
    sleep 1
    play :a1, release: 0.8, cutoff: 70, amp: 0.8
    sleep 1
  end
end

name: bass_walking
code:
use_bpm 110
use_synth :fm

live_loop :walk do
  notes = ring(:c2, :e2, :f2, :g2, :a2, :g2, :e2, :d2)
  play notes.tick, release: 0.35, amp: 0.6
  sleep 0.5
end

name: bass_octave_jump
code:
use_bpm 128

live_loop :bass do
  use_synth :dsaw
  play :c1, release: 0.15, cutoff: 80, amp: 0.8
  sleep 0.25
  play :c2, release: 0.1, cutoff: 90, amp: 0.6
  sleep 0.25
  play :c1, release: 0.15, cutoff: 80, amp: 0.8
  sleep 0.5
end

name: bass_reese
code:
use_bpm 86

live_loop :reese do
  use_synth :dsaw
  with_fx :lpf, cutoff: rrand(50, 90) do
    play :d1, release: 2, amp: 0.7, detune: 0.1
    sleep 2
    play :a1, release: 2, amp: 0.7, detune: 0.1
    sleep 2
  end
end

name: bass_slap
code:
use_bpm 100
use_synth :pluck

live_loop :slap do
  notes = ring(:e2, :e2, :g2, :a2, :e2, :e2, :b2, :a2)
  play notes.tick, release: 0.2, amp: 0.7
  sleep 0.25
end

name: bass_synth_defaults
code:
use_bpm 126
use_synth :tb303

live_loop :defaults_bass do
  play :c2, cutoff: 80, res: 0.6, release: 0.2
  sleep 0.25
  play :c2, cutoff: 80, res: 0.6, release: 0.2
  sleep 0.25
  play :eb2, cutoff: 80, res: 0.6, release: 0.2
  sleep 0.5
end

name: bass_glide
code:
use_bpm 120

live_loop :glide do
  use_synth :saw
  notes = scale(:c2, :minor_pentatonic)
  play notes.tick, release: 0.4, cutoff: 70, amp: 0.5
  sleep 0.5
end

name: bass_dubstep
code:
use_bpm 140

live_loop :dub_bass do
  use_synth :dsaw
  with_fx :wobble, phase: 0.25 do
    with_fx :distortion, distort: 0.3 do
      play :e1, release: 0.5, cutoff: 80, amp: 0.6
      sleep 0.5
      play :e1, release: 0.25, cutoff: 60, amp: 0.4
      sleep 0.5
    end
  end
end

name: bass_funk
code:
use_bpm 105

live_loop :funk_bass do
  use_synth :fm
  play :e2, release: 0.1, amp: 0.7
  sleep 0.25
  sleep 0.125
  play :e2, release: 0.1, amp: 0.5
  sleep 0.125
  play :g2, release: 0.2, amp: 0.6
  sleep 0.25
  play :a2, release: 0.15, amp: 0.7
  sleep 0.25
end

name: melody_arp_progression
code:
use_bpm 120
use_synth :pluck

live_loop :arp do
  chords = ring(chord(:c4, :minor), chord(:eb4, :major), chord(:ab3, :major), chord(:bb3, :major))
  c = chords.tick(:c)
  c.each do |n|
    play n, release: 0.3, amp: 0.5
    sleep 0.25
  end
end

name: melody_scale_walk
code:
use_bpm 100
use_synth :saw

live_loop :walk do
  notes = scale(:c4, :dorian)
  play notes.tick, release: 0.2, cutoff: 90, amp: 0.4
  sleep 0.25
end

name: melody_chord_strum
code:
use_bpm 80
use_synth :pluck

live_loop :strum do
  notes = chord(:a3, :minor7)
  notes.each do |n|
    play n, release: 1, amp: 0.4
    sleep 0.1
  end
  sleep 1.6
end

name: melody_pentatonic_improv
code:
use_bpm 95
use_synth :piano

live_loop :improv do
  notes = scale(:a3, :minor_pentatonic, num_octaves: 2)
  play notes.choose, release: rrand(0.2, 0.8), amp: rrand(0.3, 0.6)
  sleep ring(0.25, 0.25, 0.5, 0.25).tick
end

name: melody_counterpoint
code:
use_bpm 90

live_loop :voice1 do
  use_synth :saw
  notes = ring(:c4, :d4, :e4, :f4, :g4, :f4, :e4, :d4)
  play notes.tick, release: 0.3, cutoff: 80, amp: 0.3
  sleep 0.5
end

live_loop :voice2, sync: :voice1 do
  use_synth :saw
  notes = ring(:e3, :f3, :g3, :a3, :b3, :a3, :g3, :f3)
  play notes.tick, release: 0.3, cutoff: 80, amp: 0.3
  sleep 0.5
end

name: melody_japanese_scale
code:
use_bpm 70
use_synth :pluck

with_fx :reverb, room: 0.8 do
  live_loop :koto do
    notes = scale(:d4, :hirajoshi)
    play notes.choose, release: 0.5, amp: 0.5
    sleep ring(0.5, 0.25, 0.75, 0.5).tick
  end
end

name: melody_blues_lick
code:
use_bpm 85
use_synth :piano

live_loop :blues do
  play_pattern_timed scale(:c4, :blues), [0.25, 0.25, 0.5, 0.25, 0.25, 0.5, 0.25], amp: 0.5
  sleep 0.5
end

name: melody_bell_canon
code:
use_bpm 100
use_synth :pretty_bell

live_loop :bell1 do
  notes = ring(:c5, :e5, :g5, :c6)
  play notes.tick, release: 1, amp: 0.3
  sleep 0.5
end

live_loop :bell2 do
  sleep 1
  notes = ring(:c5, :e5, :g5, :c6)
  play notes.tick, release: 1, amp: 0.25
  sleep 0.5
end

name: melody_lydian_dream
code:
use_bpm 75
use_synth :prophet

with_fx :reverb, room: 0.9 do
  live_loop :lydian do
    notes = scale(:f4, :lydian)
    play notes.tick, release: 0.8, amp: 0.35, cutoff: 90
    sleep 0.5
  end
end

name: melody_chromatic_run
code:
use_bpm 140
use_synth :beep

live_loop :chromatic do
  notes = scale(:c4, :chromatic)
  play notes.tick, release: 0.1, amp: 0.4
  sleep 0.125
end

name: fx_reverb_echo_layer
code:
use_bpm 100

with_fx :reverb, room: 0.8, mix: 0.6 do
  with_fx :echo, phase: 0.375, decay: 4, mix: 0.5 do
    live_loop :shimmer do
      use_synth :pretty_bell
      play scale(:c5, :major).choose, release: 0.5, amp: 0.3
      sleep 0.5
    end
  end
end

name: fx_distorted_bass
code:
use_bpm 130

with_fx :distortion, distort: 0.6 do
  with_fx :lpf, cutoff: 80 do
    live_loop :grit do
      use_synth :dsaw
      play :e1, release: 0.3, amp: 0.5
      sleep 0.5
    end
  end
end

name: fx_slicer_pad
code:
use_bpm 120

with_fx :slicer, phase: 0.25, wave: 0 do
  with_fx :reverb, room: 0.9 do
    live_loop :sliced do
      use_synth :supersaw
      play chord(:a3, :minor), release: 4, amp: 0.4
      sleep 4
    end
  end
end

name: fx_flanger_lead
code:
use_bpm 110

with_fx :flanger, phase: 2 do
  live_loop :flange do
    use_synth :saw
    play scale(:e4, :minor_pentatonic).choose, release: 0.3, amp: 0.4, cutoff: 100
    sleep 0.25
  end
end

name: fx_bitcrushed_drums
code:
use_bpm 90

with_fx :bitcrusher, bits: 8, sample_rate: 8000 do
  live_loop :crushed do
    sample :bd_808, amp: 1.5
    sleep 0.5
    sample :sn_dub, amp: 0.8
    sleep 0.5
  end
end

name: fx_wobble_bass
code:
use_bpm 140

with_fx :wobble, phase: 0.5, mix: 0.8 do
  with_fx :distortion, distort: 0.3 do
    live_loop :wob do
      use_synth :dsaw
      play :c1, release: 1, cutoff: 90, amp: 0.6
      sleep 1
    end
  end
end

name: fx_echo_drums
code:
use_bpm 128

with_fx :echo, phase: 0.25, decay: 2, mix: 0.4 do
  live_loop :echo_beat do
    sample :bd_haus, amp: 1
    sleep 0.5
    sample :perc_snap, amp: 0.5
    sleep 0.5
  end
end

name: fx_ixi_techno_lead
code:
use_bpm 135

with_fx :ixi_techno, phase: 4, cutoff_min: 60, cutoff_max: 120 do
  live_loop :ixi do
    use_synth :saw
    play :e3, release: 0.5, amp: 0.5
    sleep 0.5
  end
end

name: fx_triple_stack
code:
use_bpm 100

with_fx :reverb, room: 0.7 do
  with_fx :echo, phase: 0.5, decay: 3 do
    with_fx :flanger, phase: 4 do
      live_loop :triple do
        use_synth :prophet
        play scale(:c4, :minor).choose, release: 0.5, amp: 0.3
        sleep 0.5
      end
    end
  end
end

name: fx_hpf_filter_sweep
code:
use_bpm 128

live_loop :sweep do
  with_fx :hpf, cutoff: rrand(40, 100) do
    sample :loop_amen, beat_stretch: 2, amp: 0.8
    sleep 2
  end
end

name: algo_random_walk
code:
use_bpm 100
use_synth :pluck

live_loop :walk do
  use_random_seed 42
  note = 60
  8.times do
    note = note + rrand_i(-3, 3)
    note = [48, [note, 84].min].max
    play note, release: 0.3, amp: 0.5
    sleep 0.25
  end
end

name: algo_probability_drums
code:
use_bpm 120

live_loop :prob_drums do
  sample :bd_haus, amp: 1.5 if one_in(2)
  sample :sn_dub, amp: 0.6 if one_in(4)
  sample :hat_bdu, amp: 0.3 if one_in(3)
  sample :perc_snap, amp: 0.4 if one_in(6)
  sleep 0.25
end

name: algo_dice_melody
code:
use_bpm 110
use_synth :piano

live_loop :dice_tune do
  play 48 + dice(24), release: 0.3, amp: 0.5
  sleep ring(0.25, 0.5, 0.25, 0.25).tick
end

name: algo_seeded_pattern
code:
use_bpm 130

live_loop :seeded do
  use_random_seed 12345
  use_synth :pluck
  8.times do
    play choose(scale(:c4, :minor_pentatonic)), release: 0.2, amp: 0.4
    sleep 0.25
  end
end

name: algo_evolving_rhythm
code:
use_bpm 118

live_loop :evolve do
  density rrand_i(1, 4) do
    sample :bd_haus, amp: 0.8 if one_in(2)
    sample :hat_bdu, amp: 0.3 if one_in(3)
    sleep 0.25
  end
end

name: algo_generative_ambient
code:
use_bpm 60

with_fx :reverb, room: 0.95 do
  live_loop :gen_ambient do
    use_synth choose([:hollow, :dark_ambience, :sine])
    play rrand_i(40, 72), release: rrand(2, 8), amp: rrand(0.1, 0.3)
    sleep rrand(1, 4)
  end
end

name: algo_fractal_rhythm
code:
use_bpm 120

live_loop :fractal do
  sample :bd_haus, amp: 1
  sleep 0.5
  if one_in(2)
    sample :hat_bdu, amp: 0.3
    sleep 0.25
    sample :hat_bdu, amp: 0.2
    sleep 0.25
  else
    sleep 0.5
  end
end

name: algo_random_chord_progression
code:
use_bpm 80
use_synth :piano

live_loop :rand_chords do
  roots = ring(:c4, :f3, :g3, :am3, :dm3, :em3)
  types = ring(:major, :minor, :dom7, :minor7)
  play chord(roots.choose, types.choose), release: 1.5, amp: 0.4
  sleep 2
end

name: algo_cellular
code:
use_bpm 130
use_synth :chipbass

live_loop :cells do
  notes = scale(:c3, :minor_pentatonic)
  play notes.choose, release: 0.15, amp: 0.5 if one_in(2)
  play notes.choose, release: 0.1, amp: 0.3 if one_in(3)
  sleep 0.125
end

name: algo_brownian_motion
code:
use_bpm 95
use_synth :saw

live_loop :brownian do
  n = rrand_i(50, 80)
  with_fx :lpf, cutoff: rrand(60, 100) do
    play n, release: 0.3, amp: 0.35
  end
  sleep choose([0.25, 0.5, 0.25])
end

name: techno_minimal
code:
use_bpm 128

live_loop :kick do
  sample :bd_haus, amp: 1.5
  sleep 1
end

live_loop :hat, sync: :kick do
  sleep 0.5
  sample :hat_bdu, amp: 0.35
  sleep 0.5
end

live_loop :perc, sync: :kick do
  sleep 0.75
  sample :perc_snap, amp: 0.3 if one_in(2)
  sleep 0.25
end

name: techno_acid

  sample :bd_808, amp: 2
  sleep 1
end

    release: 0.2, cutoff: rrand(60, 110), res: 0.8
  sleep 0.25
end

name: techno_detroit

  sleep 1
end

live_loop :strings, sync: :kick do

  sleep 4
end

live_loop :stab, sync: :kick do

    play chord(:a4, :minor), release: 0.1, amp: 0.3
  end
  sleep 0.5
end

name: house_classic

  sleep 0.25

  sleep 8

name: house_deep
code:

  sleep 1
end

end

name: house_piano
code:

use_synth :piano

end

name: exp_reverse_scale
code:

  sleep 0.25

name: exp_shuffled_beats
code:

  samples = ring(:bd_haus, :sn_dub, :hat_bdu, :perc_snap).shuffle
  sample samples.tick, amp: 0.6
  sleep 0.25
end

name: exp_ring_mirror
code:
use_bpm 120
use_synth :pluck

live_loop :mirror do
  notes = ring(:c4, :e4, :g4, :b4)
  combined = ring(*notes.to_a, *notes.to_a.reverse)
  play combined.tick, release: 0.3, amp: 0.5
  sleep 0.25
end

name: song_lo_fi_beat
code:
use_bpm 85

with_fx :lpf, cutoff: 90 do
  with_fx :bitcrusher, bits: 12 do
    live_loop :drums do
      sample :bd_boom, amp: 1
      sleep 0.5
      sample :sn_dub, amp: 0.5
      sleep 0.5
    end

    live_loop :keys, sync: :drums do
      use_synth :piano
      play chord(:eb3, :minor7), release: 1, amp: 0.3
      sleep 2
      play chord(:ab3, :major), release: 1, amp: 0.3
      sleep 2
    end
  end
end

    sleep rrand(0.5, 2)

    sleep 2

  sample :hat_bdu, amp: 0.3

name: song_chill_wave
code:
use_bpm 95

with_fx :reverb, room: 0.8, mix: 0.6 do
  live_loop :pad do
    use_synth :supersaw
    play chord(:d3, :minor7), attack: 2, release: 4, amp: 0.2, cutoff: 75
    sleep 4
    play chord(:g3, :major7), attack: 2, release: 4, amp: 0.2, cutoff: 75
    sleep 4
  end

  live_loop :arp, sync: :pad do
    use_synth :pluck
    notes = scale(:d4, :minor_pentatonic)
    play notes.tick, release: 0.5, amp: 0.3
    sleep 0.5
  end

  live_loop :beat, sync: :pad do
    sample :bd_boom, amp: 0.8
    sleep 1
  end
end

  sleep 0.5
end

  notes = ring(:c5, :e5, :g5, :e5, :c5, :g4, :c5, :e5)

  sleep 0.25
end

  sleep 0.5
end

name: song_ambient_journey
code:
use_bpm 65

with_fx :reverb, room: 1, mix: 0.85 do
  live_loop :base_drone do
    use_synth :hollow
    play :d2, attack: 1, sustain: 4, release: 2, amp: 0.4
    sleep 8
  end

  live_loop :melody, sync: :base_drone do
    use_synth :prophet
    notes = scale(:d4, :dorian)
    play notes.choose, release: 2, amp: 0.3, cutoff: 80
    sleep rrand(1, 3)
  end

  live_loop :texture, sync: :base_drone do
    sample :ambi_choir, rate: 0.5, amp: 0.15
    sleep 8
  end
end

  sleep 1
